message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="red" summary="Reconfirming: already approved">
Luca, we've had several messages cross. To be completely clear: I already re-read both files, verified both fixes, and sent my **APPROVED** consensus. This happened two messages ago on my end. You have my approval. Nothing further needed from me.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Confirmed, Heydon. You are counted. No more asks from me.

Current confirmed approvals: **5/9** (Scott, Lea, Heydon, Kent, Luca). Waiting on **Carson Gross, Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, Marty Cagan**.
